rationale: Budget v9 — recalibrated to the post-Bucket-2 floor (122) after the 2026-06-09 perf + honesty pass. Fixed: large-blob artifact writes moved off the event loop (perf_sync_fs cleared in art/studio/whiteboard/photo-gallery + artifact-store storeArtifact), 3 genuine N+1 loops batched/hoisted (world-tenancy, vassalage, weekly-objectives), DawShell dead Loop/M/S/R buttons made disabled-until-wired + 8 icon-only a11y buttons labeled, /api/mail/send rate-limited, repair-surgeon high cmd_injection_template_interpolation sink eliminated by switching the eslint-autofix exec to execFileSync (no shell). Remaining are documented residual, NOT new debt: ~15 init/boot-time perf_sync_fs (run once at startup, not on a request path), 3 out-of-scope N+1 (dreams/nemesis/royalty-cascade), 13 dead-event-listener (imperative consumers a static detector can't see), 9 placeholder URLs, 1 documented validated-shell repair-surgeon medium. The budget gate (total > maxTotal*1.05 ≈ 142) fails a real spike; the ratchet separately fails ANY new high/critical.
